title: Funding Boost to Advance SiPHyR Hydrogen Project
content: 1414 Degreesâ€™ proprietary SiPHyRâ„¢ (Storage integrated Pyrolytic Hydrogen Reactor) technology has received a significant funding boost, with the award of a $492,526 Australiaâ€™s Economic Accelerator (AEA) Ignite grant to support its next phase of development. SiPHyR is designed to produce low-cost turquoise hydrogen and valuable solid carbon co-products from methane pyrolysis.
author: Analysts Account
